pomSelectorIssues.issue: Selectors use only English/Chinese regex patterns, missing French. All aria-labels and text content are in French.
All element locators use English/Chinese only. French tab labels are 'Principales'/'Recrutement', nav links are 'Se connecter'/'Rejoindre la liste d'attente'
Selectors use English/Chinese. French send button is 'Envoyer le lien de réinitialisation', back link is 'Retour à la connexion'

All selectors use English/Chinese. French placeholders/labels differ: email='nom@entreprise.com', name='Nom', company='Entreprise', role='Poste / Fonction', use case='Comment comptez-vous utiliser Mira'

criticalBugs.description: Clicking 'Envoyer le lien de réinitialisation' with empty or invalid email redirects to /sign-in instead of showing client-side validation error. Expected French validation message 'Veuillez saisir une adresse e-mail valide' is not displayed.
After clicking 'Continuer' in the password reset confirmation step, page navigates to /sign-in instead of staying at /forgot-password. Test TC-CDP-FP-006 expects URL to remain /forgot-password.

mobileAnalysis.viewportTested: 1280x720 (desktop only - CDP MCP does not support viewport resize)
mobileLayoutFindings: sign-in, forgot-password, join-waitlist forms use max-w-[360px] container - fits 390px mobile viewport without overflow
Home page h2 headings use text-base (16px) on mobile via Tailwind, not 44px - no overflow risk
Home page bottom CTA heading uses text-2xl (24px) on mobile - no overflow
Home page nav collapses on mobile: md:hidden class shows dropdown menu with 'Fonctionnalités', 'Se connecter', 'Rejoindre la liste d'attente'
No text truncation detected at desktop viewport
No overflow detected at desktop viewport
potentialMobileIssues: Nav item 'Rejoindre la liste d'attente' (205px wide, nowrap) - at desktop fits fine, at mobile goes into hamburger menu
Cannot confirm actual mobile rendering without viewport resize capability
